content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.10%, India VIX +2.95% to 17.11 — risk-off tape with broad weakness. However, IT (+1.00%) and select pockets (chemicals, auto, defence) showing relative strength on stock-specific Q4 catalysts. Book is heavily deployed (61%) with 13 CNC positions; priority is managing winners with trailing SLs rather than adding to a tape with rising VIX. COFORGE +8.5%, PNBHOUSING +10.4%, CAMS +4.3% deserve aggressive SL trails to lock in gains.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +10.4%, CMP 1086.30. Current SL 1072.12 is already at +9% above entry (locked-in gain). New SL would need to maintain >=1% trail-gap from CMP — 1072.12 sits 1.3% below CMP, which fits the discipline. Holding SL/target unchanged — emitting HOLD instead would be cleaner since values match stored. Revising to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +10.4% at 1086.30. Stored SL 1072.12 already trails 1.3% below CMP — appropriate gap, locks in ~9% gain. Q4 strong (PAT +19%, AUM>90k Cr), bullish thesis intact. SL trail is correctly placed; not micro-adjusting."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%. Gold ETF as macro hedge; VIX rising, geopolitical tensions intact. SL 121.00 sits 2.6% below CMP 124.22 — appropriate gap. Hedge function preserved; no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 845.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, CMP 828.50. Stored SL 818 sits 1.3% below CMP — appropriate gap. Raising SL to entry (820) locks in breakeven, still 1.0% trail-gap from CMP. Q4 strong (PAT +14%, revenue +22%), record high. Trail-up to breakeven per Rule 14(a)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +8.5%, CMP 1362.60. Stored SL 1338.68 is 1.75% below CMP — locks in +6.3% gain, appropriate trail-gap. SL already correctly placed; no change needed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +8.5%. Stored SL 1338.68 already trails 1.75% below CMP, locking in +6.3%. IT sector +1% today, Q4 strong, Encora deal closed. Trail discipline holds."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, CMP 3067.10. Stored SL 3030 is 1.2% below CMP — adequate trail-gap. Defence sector intact, Q4 strong (PAT +24%). Not at trail threshold yet (P&L <2%); SL stays."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.3%, CMP 839.75. Stored SL 825 sits 1.76% below CMP — appropriate gap. Already locked in +2.4%. SL correctly placed; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.3%. Stored SL 825 already trails 1.76% below CMP, locks in +2.4%. Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%, MF AUM crossed 55L Cr. Trail in place."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.1% essentially flat at 1483.10. Stored SL 1445 is 2.6% below CMP, within risk budget. Q4 strong (PAT +37%, margin +280bps), thesis intact. No new info to justify change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6% at 1609.50. Stored SL 1580 is 1.8% below CMP — adequate gap. Q4 turnaround real (PAT 166cr vs -25cr YoY); position is not stretched. Holding to original thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2%. SL 2745 sits 1.4% below CMP 2782.80 — appropriate. Q4 strong, chemicals leader. Not at trail threshold; SL stays."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2% at 9117. SL 9020 is 1.06% below CMP — at the minimum trail-gap floor. Q4 record revenue, dividend Rs 47, fresh ATH. Not at trail threshold (P&L <2%); SL stays."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6% at 2005.30. Stored SL 1955 is 2.5% below CMP. Q4 PAT -17.4% YoY (exceptional charges) — mixed signal but defence book strong. Holding within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4% at 362.95. SL 354 is 2.5% below CMP — within risk budget. Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending +32%, top NBFC pick. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6% at 10713. SL 10440 is 2.5% below CMP. Q4 PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 (~12% premium), dividend Rs 150. Strong tailwinds; thesis intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "reasoning": "SL already trails 1.3% below CMP, locks +9%. Optimal placement."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge function; SL gap appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to entry (breakeven); 1% gap from CMP preserved."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +6.3% locked-in level, 1.75% trail-gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "reasoning": "P&L 1.5%; below 2% trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL trails 1.76% below CMP, locks +2.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat; original SL within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss; SL absorbs normal noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2745.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain; SL at min 1% trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss; SL within budget."
    },
    {

  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through BULLISH-rated candidates not held (Rule 18 explicit per-name reject):\n- LAURUSLABS, FINCABLES, GABRIEL, THERMAX, PERSISTENT, DABUR, RAMCOCEM, LUPIN, APOLLOTYRE: not yet sized; book is already 61% deployed across 13 names with cluster exposure to BFSI (PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL), Capital Goods (GRSE + POLYCAB), Auto (BHARATFORG + BAJAJ-AUTO), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA), Chemicals (SRF + PIDILITIND). Adding more would breach cluster cap (Rule 10 hard limit: max 1 new entry per cluster where I already hold a name).\n- THERMAX +14.5% — extended; would chase a vertical move on a risk-off tape.\n- PERSISTENT — IT cluster covered by COFORGE; no add per Rule 10.\n- NUVAMA: REJECT — explicit governance overhang (SEBI warning letter to subsidiary NWIL May 6, NSE penalty Apr 22 — two regulatory actions in 3 weeks). Q4 board meeting May 11 also triggers Rule 11 (binary event within 3 sessions). Two independent disqualifiers. Negative sentiment modifier -0.08.\n- INDUSINDBK: REJECT — Rule 13 governance overhang (SFIO criminal probe, SEBI insider-trading restraint, Rs 1,979cr derivatives lapse) explicitly cited in prior failure mode (Day-5).\n- TATATECH: REJECT — NEUTRAL sentiment with -0.03 modifier; FY26 PAT down 19% YoY, sector -25% YTD, valuation P/E 46 stretched. Volume surge alone insufficient.\n- BHARATFORG additional research surfaced -17.4% Q4 PAT and NA truck cycle collapse; already held, holding existing position but not adding.\nDeployment 61% is above the 50% threshold cited in Rule 18 — admit-side discipline satisfied via explicit per-name reject rationale on a CAUTIOUS-tape day with VIX +2.95%.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-distributed across 13 CNC names with no single position exceeding ~10% of capital. Total unrealized P&L +1.21%. Three winners (PNBHOUSING +10.4%, COFORGE +8.5%, CAMS +4.3%) have SLs trailed appropriately, locking in 9%+, 6.3%, and 2.4% respectively. MARICO trailed up to breakeven this cycle. Risk-off tape (VIX +2.95%, Bank Nifty -1.1%) supports defensive posture: managing the existing book over chasing fresh entries. HFCL pending MIS LIMIT @133.50 has been OPEN ~57 hours — it should have expired/cancelled by now; will let exchange handle. Daily loss limit untouched (75,770 remaining)."
}
